description: Capability set for the dm-detail secondary window. Receives the DM event via IPC (core:event) and invokes the dm_detail_window_ready handshake + show/focus. Without this file the window's invoke()/listen calls silently fail the capability check, so dm_detail_window_ready never reaches Rust and the window (created visible:false, shown only by the handshake) never appears — the symptom is clicking 'Open details' on a DM notification doing nothing. The window reuses the shared <Conversation/>, so it also invokes the shared messaging commands fetch_dm_thread + send_dm and, for US-025 Reactions UI, toggle_reaction (POST add / DELETE remove /v1/notify/reactions) + fetch_reactions (GET /v1/notify/reactions) + set_active_conversation (registers which conversation + message ids are open so the SINGLE DM poll path can re-fetch reactions on a 'reaction' wake); the reaction realtime event message:reaction is emitted by that poll path and authorized by core:event:default. All custom commands are authorized by core:default (custom commands are not gated by per-command permission identifiers — only plugins are). Mirrors share-detail.json / messages.json.
